source_title: Tuna Steak mit ponzu sauce mit Kartoffeln & Romanesco
normalized_title: Tuna Steak with Ponzu, Potatoes, and Romanesco
query: seared tuna steak with ponzu sauce, roasted potatoes, and romanesco

draft.title: Tuna Steak with Ponzu, Potatoes, and Romanesco
draft.description: Seared tuna steak served with tangy ponzu sauce, roasted potatoes, and steamed romanesco for a balanced Japanese-inspired meal.

ingredients.name: lemon
ingredients.note: optional, for garnish and extra citrus

steps.text: Preheat oven to 200°C. Toss potato chunks with 2 tbsp olive oil, crushed garlic, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking tray and roast for 20-25 minutes until golden and tender.
While potatoes roast, bring a pot of salted water to boil. Steam romanesco florets for 5-7 minutes until just tender but still crisp. Drain and set aside.
Pat tuna steaks dry and season with salt and pepper. Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear tuna steaks for 1.5-2 minutes per side for rare, or longer to desired doneness. Remove from heat and let rest for 2 minutes.
Slice tuna steaks against the grain. Arrange on plates with roasted potatoes and romanesco.
Drizzle ponzu sauce over tuna and vegetables. Garnish with a squeeze of lemon if desired and serve immediately.
